system: HR Management System — Enterprise UML Class Diagram (Enhanced)

packages.name: EmployeeManagement
packages.description: Central hub. Manages employee lifecycle, profiles, documents, contracts.

packages.name: TimeManagement
packages.description: Shift scheduling, attendance, overtime, biometric sync, payroll feed.

packages.name: PayrollManagement
packages.description: Payroll cycles, salary calc, deductions, tax, payslips, final settlements.

packages.name: LeaveManagement
packages.description: Leave types, policies, requests, approvals, accruals, carry-forward.

packages.name: WorkflowEngine
packages.description: Multi-level approvals, escalation, workflow states, approval chains.

packages.name: SecurityAndRBAC
packages.description: RBAC, authentication, sessions, access policies, permissions.

packages.name: NotificationSystem
packages.description: Event-driven notification dispatch with templates and recipients.

packages.name: AnalyticsAndReporting
packages.description: KPIs, dashboards, workforce metrics, predictive alerts, report export.

constraints.rule: email must be unique across all employees
baseSalary must be >= 0
endDate must be null or > startDate
checkOut must be after checkIn when both present
workedHours >= 0
available balance must never go below 0 for paid leave
endDate >= startDate
status transitions: DRAFT→SUBMITTED→PENDING_MANAGER→APPROVED/REJECTED→FINALIZED
cycle cannot close before status reaches APPROVED
locked cycle cannot be modified without unfreeze
netPay = grossPay - totalDeductions; must not be negative without override
payroll sync blocked if hasMissingPunches is true
bracketMax > bracketMin
maxCarryForwardDays <= maxDaysPerYear
effectiveTo must be null or > effectiveFrom
username must be unique
toDate > fromDate; delegator != delegatee
hours > 0 and <= policy maximum
triggerAfterHours > 0
must only be created after employee deactivation

crossModuleIntegrations.description: Approved leave syncs to attendance so absences not counted as worked hours
Unpaid leave deductions and encashments pushed as PayrollAdjustments at cycle processing
TimeSheet feeds workedHours and overtimeHours to PayrollCycle; missing punches block run
Employee contractType and probationEndDate drive shift assignment and scheduling rules
Employee baseSalary and gradeLevel determine SalaryStructure applicability
Employee tenure and contractType determine leave eligibility and entitlements
ApprovalWorkflow drives multi-level leave request approvals with escalation
EventTrigger fires notifications on key state transitions across all modules
AnalyticsService consumes data from all modules for KPIs and predictive alerts
